title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Ladder family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
